title: School Outreach Visit
subtitle: To create awareness and interest among school students in optics, photonics, and related scientific concepts through an interactive educational visit.
description: BVP OPTICA conducted a school outreach visit aimed at introducing students to the fundamentals of optics and science through interactive discussions and engagement activities. The session focused on encouraging curiosity and learning in a friendly and participative environment.
highlights: Participation:A large number of school students and faculty members participated in the session along with members of the BVP OPTICA team.
